creator: sanewo@ba2.so-net.ne.jp
text:
due to buffer overrun, some hacks of xscreensaver dumps core sporadically.

Fix: Following patch shuould close a bug.
I don't know if there are other bugs like this one, though.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install and invoke xscreensaver and let it run for a while (e.g. one night),
and you will see couple core dumps.
